description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy slipper from carlton london makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 1"UpperLeather straps across the midfoot with a toe separator and heavy embellishmentsElasticated ankle strap for a custom FitPadded synthetic leather footbed OutsoleDurable PU outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
